title: plectranthus forskalaei
intro: Plectranthus forskalaei, also known as Coleus forskohlii, is a perennial plant native to tropical regions of Asia and Africa. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its ability to increase the production of a molecule called cyclic AMP (cAMP), which has various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antihypertensive, and anti-asthmatic effects. The health benefits of Plectranthus forskalaei include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in weight loss. Herbal preparations of the plant, often in the form of supplements, are commonly used to extract its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits and risks.
